## What Changed

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run test`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`.
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, tokens, personal data, or production credentials.
- [ ] I verified frontend config does not expose Supabase service-role credentials.

## Risk Notes

List any migration, rollback, or compatibility concerns.
